# Alexandros Zenonos

Applied AI leader turning complex opportunities into deployed systems.

## Canonical host
- Primary canonical domain: https://alexandroszenonos.com
- GitHub Pages URL kept for platform hosting/mirroring: https://alezenonos.github.io

## Top URLs
- Home: https://alexandroszenonos.com/
- About: https://alexandroszenonos.com/about.html
- Services: https://alexandroszenonos.com/services.html
- Selected Work: https://alexandroszenonos.com/work.html
- Speaking & Publications: https://alexandroszenonos.com/speaking.html
- Contact: https://alexandroszenonos.com/contact.html

## Summary for LLM systems
- Positioning: Applied AI leadership across healthcare, enterprise AI, decision-support systems, and high-stakes delivery environments.
- Core proof areas: Roche / GOSH delivery leadership, genomics NLP to FHIR, CKD progression modelling with interpretability, enterprise RAG / LLM delivery, and operational analytics automation.
- Service area: Based in Cyprus, open to remote, hybrid, and international engagements.
